steps.title: Identify the relative clause
steps.content: The words after the blank give extra information about the Engravers' Copyright Act: it gave engravers control over print distribution and sale. That extra information needs a comma plus the relative pronoun which.

steps.title: Avoid broken boundaries
steps.content: B uses a semicolon before a dependent clause. C creates a fragment with Which, and D leaves the sentence without the needed relative pronoun. The answer is A.
